description: Patronus AI provides tooling to evaluate, monitor, and improve large-language-model applications, including automated evaluators, experiments, tracing, and datasets. Its platform is used to test AI outputs, log evaluations, and analyze application behavior.
summary: Patronus exposes an authenticated REST API at `https://api.patronus.ai/v1` and an open-source MCP server package that uses a Patronus API key; no public GraphQL API or standalone CLI was found.
